_meta.purpose: Curated VA data-center projects that were stopped, paused, rejected, or blocked by moratorium. Map-overlay source for build_site.py -> dist/va_stopped_dc.geojson.
_meta.WARNING: AI-seeded demo data. Coordinates are APPROXIMATE (locality-level). Every entry has verified=false until a human confirms the facts and replaces source with a real URL. DO NOT present as authoritative — label as demo and verify before the pitch.

projects.name: PW Digital Gateway (litigation)
projects.reason: ~2,100-acre rezoning approved Dec 2023; challenged in court, construction stalled by litigation.
projects.source: VERIFY — widely reported (Prince William Times / WaPo)

projects.name: Fauquier moratorium / restrictive posture
projects.reason: County imposed tight limits / pause on new data-center applications amid resident opposition.

projects.name: Warrenton AWS site (contested approval)
projects.reason: SUP approved by narrow vote March 2023; lawsuits and appeals followed, delaying the project.

projects.name: Culpeper application pushback
projects.reason: One or more rezoning/SUP requests denied or withdrawn after community opposition.

projects.name: Caroline County pause
projects.reason: Proposed campus delayed pending utility/grid and ordinance review.

projects.name: Page County restrictive ordinance
projects.reason: Rural county adopted limits / pause on data-center development.

projects.name: Clarke County prohibition posture
projects.reason: Strongly restrictive zoning effectively blocking large data centers.

projects.name: Orange County withdrawal
projects.reason: Developer withdrew application amid opposition / unfavorable staff report.

projects.name: Spotsylvania contested project
projects.reason: Large campus proposal delayed during rezoning review.

projects.name: Stafford County pushback
projects.reason: Rezoning request denied / sent back amid resident concerns.
